wins: Strong Q1 results with net income of $4.1 billion and EPS of $1.96
Services recorded its highest first quarter revenue in a decade
TTS continued momentum in U.S. dollar clearing and cross-border activity
Security Services grew assets under custody and administration to $26 trillion
M&A revenue nearly doubled due to leading role in major transactions
risks: Uncertainty in macroeconomic outlook and potential credit risks
Potential impact of SCB results on buyback pace
Uncertainty in the macro environment affecting client behavior
Credit losses and ACL build due to macroeconomic deterioration
Possible impact of geopolitical tensions on global trade and operations
